summary_one_line: ICC profile bytes that route parsing into ReadSetOfCurves with a failed curve slot, freeing a NULL Curve (true branch)

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An ICC profile whose header signature bytes form a class/tag combination (device class 'link' at offsets 0x0c-0x0f) that dispatches parsing into ReadSetOfCurves, where at least one ReadEmbeddedCurve call returns NULL so the Error cleanup loop calls cmsFreeToneCurve(Curves[i]) on a NULL slot, taking the Curve==NULL true branch.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seeds carry the bytes 6c 69 6e 6b ('link') at offsets 0x0c-0x0f and reach the ReadSetOfCurves caller (its full body is marked [W] winner-resolving only), so the NULL-init array slots (Curves[i]=NULL at line 2505, left NULL after a goto Error) are passed to cmsFreeToneCurve, hitting the true branch (W shows T=81 on line 910).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser seeds carry 6d 6e 74 72 ('mntr') at offsets 0x0c-0x0f and never enter the ReadSetOfCurves caller (its body lines are [L]-absent), so cmsFreeToneCurve is only ever invoked on non-NULL curves elsewhere (L shows T=0 F=110 on line 910), never reaching the NULL early-return true side.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator that value_profile lacks; the I2S stage substitutes the exact 4-byte signature operands the ICC parser compares against (e.g. the 'link' device-class FOURCC) into the input at the offsets where those bytes already appear, flipping 'mntr' to 'link' and steering parsing into the ReadSetOfCurves dispatch that value_profile's distance-bucket feedback alone never crossed.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked side is the true branch of Curve==NULL inside cmsFreeToneCurve.
The globally blocked side is the true branch.
The decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog over value_profile with an I2S delta.
The caller ReadSetOfCurves initializes the curve array to NULL and frees every slot in an Error cleanup loop.
The cleanup loop calls cmsFreeToneCurve on each slot, including NULL ones, reaching the blocker.
The winner takes the true branch (T=81) on line 910 while the loser never does (T=0).
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 910  T=81 F=21  T=0 F=110  if (Curve == NULL) return;  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: The ReadSetOfCurves caller body is hit only by winner-resolving seeds.
Winner seeds carry the device-class bytes 'link' at offsets 0x0c-0x0f.
Loser seeds carry the device-class bytes 'mntr' at offsets 0x0c-0x0f.
The byte sets at offsets 0x0c-0x0f differ between W (link) and L (mntr), a concentrated dataflow signal.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace over value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2117 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 1b224ee16a374e60` and observed an I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 9 of the 10-level ancestor chain; tool reported '1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 9', characteristic of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in vpc.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where value_profile resolves the Curve==NULL true branch as often as value_profile_cmplog despite the FOURCC dispatch gate, showing the I2S substitution of the signature bytes is not what unlocks the ReadSetOfCurves NULL-free path.

weakest_evidence_point: That the specific 'link' vs 'mntr' device-class FOURCC is the exact CMP operand I2S substitutes is inferred from the byte diff and caller [W]-only coverage, not confirmed by reading the lcms profile-class dispatch source in the prompt.
